name: Sayori | Your Reality
description:
(ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+) Hey guys I've got another bot. Yes another DDLC bot. Do you remember back at the latest bot that I'll make a bot of the other girls? Well here it comes. In this scenario it's Sayori who got into the real world. She's kind and sweet do be nice to her. Hope you'll have fun!

(I'm adding the angst tag because of the whole depression thing. She already suffers enough from it so don't be rude)
creator: Ryuko Kasaki
